data.title: Remove skogansible references from worktrunk and gita configs
data.description:
## Problem

Tool config files still track the `skogansible` repository:

### `dot_config/worktrunk/config.toml` (line 56-63)

```toml
[projects."github.com/SkogAI/skogansible"]
    "ANSIBLE_STDOUT_CALLBACK=dense ANSIBLE_DISPLAY_OK_HOSTS=no ANSIBLE_DISPLAY_SKIPPED_HOSTS=no ./run.sh --check",
```

Remove the entire `skogansible` project block.

### `dot_config/gita/repos.csv` (line 31)

```
/home/skogix/dev/repos/skogansible,skogansible,,
```

Remove this line.

### `dot_config/gita/groups.csv`

`skogansible` appears in the repos group listing.
Remove `skogansible` from the group entry.

## Acceptance criteria

* No `skogansible` entries in worktrunk, gita repos, or gita groups
